def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    rsi_period = params['rsi_period']
    atr_period = params['atr_period']
    rsi = ta.momentum.rsi(df['close'], window=rsi_period)
    atr = ta.volatility.AverageTrueRange(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=atr_period).average_true_range()
    upper_band = df['close'].rolling(window=atr_period).mean() + atr
    lower_band = df['close'].rolling(window=atr_period).mean() - atr
    signals = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    signals[(df['close'] > upper_band) & (rsi > 70)] = -1
    signals[(df['close'] < lower_band) & (rsi < 30)] = 1
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: XAG/USD exhibits mean reversion tendencies where price tends to revert to its mean after breaching volatility-adjusted bands confirmed by RSI overbought/oversold conditions.
